caption: A person with blond hair wearing a dark blue shirt appears in a small video inset in the lower-left corner of a video game interface. The gameplay screen displays a player card for "TROY POLAMALU" with an overall rating that changes from "95" to "96" as the clip progresses. The interface features a purple and black theme with various menu options like "HOME," "ATTRIBUTES," and "UPGRADES." At the top, a status bar shows numerical values including "173,037," "14,800," and "2,343,543." The center of the screen highlights "ACROBAT" and a section for "SUPERSTAR X-FACTOR & ABILITIES." As the video continues, the view shifts to the "ATTRIBUTES" menu, revealing a series of numerical ratings such as "94," "97," "90," and "95" under the "KEY" category, and physical stats including "5'10"" and "207" under "GENERAL." A digital image of a football player in a white and purple jersey is visible on the right side of the screen.
